ValueSet-WHORegionalOffices.title: WHO Regional Offices Schema
ValueSet-WHORegionalOffices.description: JSON Schema for WHO Regional Offices ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
ValueSet-WHORegionalOffices.narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the WHO Regional Offices ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/trust/ValueSet-WHORegionalOffices.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
